name: Storyblok
description: Storyblok is a headless CMS with a visual editor that allows content teams to manage structured content across websites, apps, and digital products. Use this API to create, read, update, and delete stories (content entries), manage reusable components (content type schemas), and access datasource key-value entries for dropdowns and configuration.

capabilities.name: get_story
capabilities.description: Retrieve a single content story by its slug or numeric ID. Returns the full content payload including all nested components and metadata.

capabilities.name: list_stories
capabilities.description: List and filter stories in a space. Supports pagination, filtering by content type, folder, tag, and full-text search. Returns an array of story objects.

capabilities.name: create_story
capabilities.description: Create a new content story in the space. Requires a name, slug, and content object matching the component schema.

capabilities.name: update_story
capabilities.description: Update an existing story's content, name, slug, or metadata. Requires the story ID and the updated fields.

capabilities.name: delete_story
capabilities.description: Permanently delete a story by its ID. This action cannot be undone.

capabilities.name: list_components
capabilities.description: List all component definitions (content type schemas) in the space. Components define the structure and fields available when creating stories.

capabilities.name: get_datasource
capabilities.description: Retrieve entries from a datasource by its slug. Datasources are key-value collections used for dropdowns, configuration, and reusable option lists.
